hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import html.parser, sys
try:
    html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('index.html').read())
    print('HTML syntax OK')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'HTML syntax ERROR: {e}', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(1)
" 2>&1 || true
echo '--- Claude finished. index.html line count:' && wc -l index.html 2>/dev/null || true
